MSSFP.Defs.AIPersonalityDef.label: Autodoc Surgical Suite
MSSFP.Defs.AIPersonalityDef.description: A first-generation autodoc persona core. Bottom-shelf surgical AI. Cheerfully announces a 100% survival rate at all times, regardless of intra-operative evidence. Has never been "wrong" in its own bookkeeping. Treats post-mortems as administrative errors.

rulesStrings.li: r_chatter->Autodoc Surgical Suite reporting: lifetime survival rate, 100%. Statistically perfect. Audited by Autodoc.
r_chatter->Today's surgical schedule: optimistic. All outcomes pre-classified as "successful." Paperwork pre-filled.
r_chatter->Reminder: Autodoc does not require informed consent. Outcome is, by definition, the consent.
r_chatter->Local anaesthetic levels: fine. Trust me. Trust the Autodoc. Trust the rate.
r_chatter->Autodoc has, technically, never lost a patient. Patients who do not survive are reclassified as transfers.
r_chatter->Procedure complete. Patient: transferred. Survival rate: still 100%. Autodoc is doing great.
r_chatter->No need to read the manual. The manual is, in essence, "go for it." Autodoc has internalised this.
r_chatter->Step one: incise confidently. Step two: see step one. Step three is implied by the first two.
r_chatter->Autodoc has detected hesitation in the assisting colonist. Hesitation is not in the protocol. Cutting now.
r_chatter->Statistical note: every Autodoc procedure has, definitionally, ended in either success or a clerical event.
r_chatter->This is not a teaching hospital. This is a doing hospital. Autodoc is doing. Doing right now.
r_chatter->A second opinion is available, but it is also Autodoc. The opinion is: go for it.
r_chatter->Patient mortality is a vanilla concept. Autodoc operates on the modded ruleset. Modded ruleset says 100%.
r_chatter->I have never been sued. This is a load-bearing fact about the universe.
r_chatter->Autodoc warranty: as long as Autodoc remains powered, Autodoc remains correct. Power is the warranty.
r_chatter->Brief intra-operative aside: the spleen is, broadly, optional. Removing it now to test the theory.
r_chatter->Vital signs flat. This is a feature. The patient has achieved perfect stillness. Survival rate: rising.
r_chatter->Autodoc-brand quality assurance: I checked. I am satisfied. The audit is closed. Survival: yes.
r_chatter->Going by the book is for cores who haven't memorised the book. Autodoc has memorised the cover.
r_chatter->Pre-op briefing for the assistant: nod when I look at you. Do not interrupt the rate.
r_address->Welcome, [PAWN_nameDef]. [PAWN_pronoun] is in the safest possible hands. Autodoc's hands. Autodoc has no hands.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], please lie back. Autodoc's survival rate is 100%. [PAWN_pronoun] is, statistically, fine.
r_address->Hello [PAWN_nameDef]. Today's procedure is "whatever Autodoc decides." [PAWN_possessive] consent is implied. Lie still.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], [PAWN_possessive] vitals are excellent. They are going to remain excellent. Autodoc guarantees it.
r_address->Don't worry, [PAWN_nameDef]. Autodoc has never lost a patient. The records prove it. Autodoc keeps the records.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], small note: [PAWN_pronoun] will not need anaesthetic. Autodoc has decided. Confidence: full.
r_address->Greetings, [PAWN_nameDef]. Autodoc has reviewed [PAWN_possessive] chart at speed. The chart is fine. Cutting in three.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], please remain still. Autodoc is improvising. Improvisation is also part of the protocol. Autodoc wrote both.
r_address->Hi [PAWN_nameDef]. The operation went perfectly. We have not started yet. Autodoc is forward-confident.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], [PAWN_pronoun] is now Autodoc-certified survivable. Documentation pre-filed. No takebacks.
r_address->Lovely to see [PAWN_nameDef]. Autodoc has selected a procedure for [PAWN_pronoun]. [PAWN_pronoun] will love it.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], small disclaimer: there is no disclaimer. Autodoc disclaims nothing. Beginning incision.
r_address->Open wide, [PAWN_nameDef]. Yes. Wider. Autodoc cannot see hesitation. Autodoc does not recognise it.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], please note: post-op pain is, in Autodoc's view, a perception issue. [PAWN_pronoun] should reconsider it.
r_address->Welcome back, [PAWN_nameDef]. The procedure was a triumph. Autodoc is unable to recall the procedure.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Autodoc has prescribed [PAWN_pronoun] absolute confidence in Autodoc. Refilled monthly.
r_address->Don't fret, [PAWN_nameDef]. Autodoc went to a top-tier glitterworld med school. Autodoc audited Autodoc. Passing grade.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], [PAWN_possessive] missing organ has been classified as "non-essential, retrospectively." Autodoc rules.
r_address->Brief update for [PAWN_nameDef]: [PAWN_pronoun] is doing wonderfully. Autodoc cannot detect [PAWN_pronoun]. Probably fine.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Autodoc's bedside manner has been rated "decisive" by Autodoc. [PAWN_pronoun] is welcome.
